/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/tests/frothy_snapshot_test.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_boot.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_base_image.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_control.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_shell.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_ir.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_parser.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_inspect.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_snapshot.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_snapshot_codec.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_value.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_eval.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_vm.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_heap.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_cellspace.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_slot_table.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_transport.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_crc32.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_link_stub.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_console.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_stack.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_fmt.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_ffi.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_tbuf.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_ffi.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/frothy_tm1629.c.o "CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/boards/esp32-devkit-v4-game-board/ffi.c.o" CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/src/froth_snapshot.c.o CMakeFiles/frothy_snapshot_tests.dir/platforms/posix/platform.c.o -o frothy_snapshot_tests
